info.title: Semyon Fox — Chat API
info.description: Conversational endpoint backing Semyon Fox's personal-site assistant. Answers as a third-person assistant representing him about his projects, blog, and background. Rate limited per-IP (20 req/min). Non-streaming, no reasoning tokens, 300-token reply cap, last 5 user/assistant turns kept server-side. Questions and replies are stored (with a coarse country code, never a raw IP) to improve the assistant; see https://semyon.ie/privacy.

post.description: Submits a list of recent messages. The server prepends a fixed system prompt and keeps only the last 5 user/assistant turns. Returns a single plain-text reply. No streaming.

messages.content: what are you working on lately?

value.reply: lately semyon's been grinding on the homelab and shipping a new feature for uisce. he's also chasing a sub-1min 100m free.

post.description: Cookieless first-party analytics ping sent by the site itself (page views, aggregate internal navigation transitions, chat opens, game launches, outbound clicks, form submissions, 404s). Navigation records only a source path, destination path, and coarse placement; it does not create a browser or session identifier. Stores an optional external referrer origin, optional query-free target, direct/external acquisition classification, normalized campaign source, device class, browser/OS family and first Accept-Language tag (parsed server-side, raw user agent never stored), a coarse country code, and a daily-rotating anonymous visitor hash. Never stores raw IPs. Requests carrying DNT: 1 or Sec-GPC: 1 are accepted but not recorded. Rate limited per-IP (60 req/min).

204.description: Recorded (or silently skipped for opted-out visitors)

400.description: Unknown event kind or invalid path/referrer

conversation_id.description: Optional client-generated id (e.g. a UUID) so multi-turn conversations can be grouped server-side.

referrer.description: External origin only; path, query and fragment are discarded server-side.

target.description: What was acted on: query-free destination origin/path for outbound_click (or email), path-only internal destination for navigation, or game id for game_open.

placement.description: Coarse link placement for navigation and outbound_click.

attribution.description: Direct or external acquisition classification on pageviews.

source.description: Normalized campaign tag from the landing URL (utm_source or ref query param).

screen.description: Coarse device class derived from viewport width.
